title: Dog Poop Bags Rolls - Biodegradable Doggie Bags, Compostable Dog Waste Bags, BPI Certified Pet Waste Bags, Unscented, Large, Puppy Poo, Earth Friendly, Bolsas de Basura (240 counts)
features: 🚫 SAY NO TO PLASTIC: Say goodbye to harmful plastic. Our dog poop bag is crafted from renewable resources like corn, PBAT, and PLA — an eco-conscious alternative to traditional doggy bags.
🌱 HOME COMPOSTABLE: Our compostable dog poop bags meet ASTM D6400 & EN 13432 standards. They break down in 90–180 days, making them ideal poop bags for dogs biodegradable and eco-friendly living.
💪 DURABLE & RELIABLE: Our doggie poop bags are large (13x9"), thick, and leak-proof — perfect for any mess. Reliable dog potty bags for daily walks and all dog sizes.
💰 GREAT VALUE: Each box includes 240 large dog poop bags rolls (16 rolls x 15 bags). Get top value with compostable poop bags for dogs that last 4 months or more.
🇬🇧 TRUSTED UK BRAND: PAWFECT is a brand registered in the UK. We offer premium-quality dog bags for poop biodegradable, combining sustainability with everyday convenience.
🗑️ MULTIPLE PURPOSE: Our doggy poop bags fit most holders and pooper scoopers. Use as dog trash bags, cat litter bags, or doggie bags for poop — great for home or travel.
🌍 SUPPORTING A CAUSE: Make a difference with biodegradable poop bags. Choosing PAWFECT poo bags dogs love supports a cleaner planet with less plastic waste.
❤️ GIVING BACK: We give 10% of profits to pet causes worldwide. Buying our dog poo bags helps animals in need while keeping your cleanup routine responsible.
description: Product Description Dog Essentials Made Simple – These bio poop bags for dogs are a smart addition to your daily dog essentials kit — strong, sustainable, and mess-free. Dog Housebreaking Supplies – Training a pup? Our small dog poop bags make cleanup easy and stress-free — perfect for housebreaking and indoor use. Poop Bags for Dogs – Enjoy unscented dog poop bags rolls that help neutralize odors while staying eco-conscious. Pet Travel Essentials for Dogs – Compact and easy to carry, these pet poop bags for dogs are travel-friendly — great for road trips, holidays, and walks. Compost Trash Bags Small – Certified compost and ideal for small bins, these bags double as compost trash bags for home use. Pooper Scooper Bags & More – Compatible with most pet waste stations and scoopers, these dog waste bags are reliable for every kind of cleanup.
